prompt: set up a codebase for an internal tool — it's a dashboard for our ops team to monitor order fulfillment. needs auth, a database, and stripe webhooks to track payment status

assertions.text: Recognizes this is an internal tool and factors that into framework choice (SPA is fine, SSR not strictly needed)
Generates auth boilerplate (middleware, provider config, or similar)
Generates a Stripe webhook handler file
Generates a database schema with order/fulfillment-relevant tables
Generates .env.example with Stripe-related env vars (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, etc.)
Files are wired together — webhook handler uses the db instance, auth protects routes, etc.
